'''鈭歠-w-r-n''' ('''kafawrenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stablish|stablish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==

|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stablish|stablish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-w-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafawrenoko
|}
